reach_why: Extends familiar critiques of formalized discovery systems, but does not open clearly unprecedented explanatory territory.
novelty_why: Non-obviously links linguistic search limits, premature filtering, hidden priors, and audit traces into one conservative failure mode.
falsifiable_why: Could be challenged by systems discovering ugly truths, formalizing hard-to-vary, or matching mathematical discovery without hidden priors.
explanation: It argues explainable discovery systems can conceal inherited biases while systematically missing disruptive truths.
